channel.title: Parlance
channel.description: Notes on AI evals, LLMs, and building AI that works in production.

item.title: Exploring Agent-Assisted Qualitative Analysis
item.description: On using AI agents to support qualitative analysis of data.

item.title: Evals Skills for Coding Agents
item.description: On building eval skills for coding agents.

item.title: LLM Evals: Everything You Need to Know
item.description: An FAQ covering common questions about evaluating LLM applications.

item.title: On the Consumption of AI-Generated Content at Scale
item.description: On the implications of consuming AI-generated content at scale.

item.title: Selecting The Right AI Evals Tool
item.description: How to choose an evals tool for your AI product.

item.title: In Defense of AI Evals, for Everyone
item.description: Making the case for AI evals as a practice for everyone building with LLMs.

item.title: Inspect AI, An OSS Python Library For LLM Evals
item.description: A look at Inspect AI, an open-source framework for building and running LLM evaluations.

item.title: Writing in the Age of LLMs
item.description: On how LLMs are changing the way we write.

item.title: Using LLM-as-a-Judge For Evaluation: A Complete Guide
item.description: A complete guide to using an LLM as a judge for evaluation.

item.title: An Open Course on LLMs, Led by Practitioners
item.description: Announcing Mastering LLMs, a free practitioner-led course on evals, RAG, and fine-tuning.

item.title: Data Flywheels for LLM Applications
item.description: On building data flywheels that improve LLM applications over time.

item.title: Short Musings on AI Engineering and "Failed AI Projects"
item.description: Brief reflections on AI engineering and why AI projects fail.

item.title: What We've Learned From A Year of Building with LLMs
item.description: A practical guide to building successful LLM products, distilled from a year of hands-on experience.

item.title: Comparing LLMs on "Real-World" Retrieval
item.description: Comparing how LLMs perform on real-world retrieval tasks.

item.title: Your AI Product Needs Evals
item.description: Why systematic evals are essential to improving AI products.
